fields.calculatedFormula:
IF
(
or(RecordType.Name = "MLC Partner", RecordType.Name="MLC", RecordType.Name="MLC Customer", RecordType.Name = "MLC Prospect", RecordType.Name = "MLC Secured Party", RecordType.Name = "Partner / Vendor", RecordType.Name = "Meridian Account"),RecordType.Name,
IF
(
or((TODAY() - Last_Won_Deal__c) < 365, Total_Open_Deals__c > 0, and( Total_Won_Deals__c >0, Days_since_Last_Activity__c <= 90, Days_since_Last_Activity__c>= 0)), "Customer",
IF
(
and((TODAY() - Last_Won_Deal__c) >364, Total_Won_Deals__c > 0, Total_Open_Deals__c = 0), "Dormant Customer",
IF
(
or((NOW() - Last_Open_Deal__c) < 365,(NOW() - CreatedDate) < 45, and(Days_since_Last_Activity__c <= 90&& Days_since_Last_Activity__c>= 0)), "Active Prospect",
"Inactive Prospect"
))))

fields.calculatedFormula: IF( Data_Quality_Score__c =100,"All Account Details Captured", "Missing: "&IF( ISPICKVAL( Industry,""),"Industry, ","")&""&IF(Sic="", "SIC Code, ","")&""&IF( LEN(BillingCity) = 0, "Complete Address, ","")&""&IF(isblank(Client_Infrastructure__c), "Infrastructure, ","")&""&IF( ISBLANK( NumberOfEmployees), "#Employees, ","")&""&IF( LEN(Phone) = 0, "Phone, ","")&""&IF( ISBLANK(AnnualRevenue), "Annual Revenue",""))

fields.name: Data_Quality_Description__c

fields.calculatedFormula: IF( ISPICKVAL(Industry,""), 0,20) + IF(Sic="", 0,20) + IF( LEN(BillingCity) = 0, 0,10) + IF( isblank( Client_Infrastructure__c ), 0,10) + IF(LEN(Phone) = 0, 0,10) + IF( ISBLANK( NumberOfEmployees), 0,10) + IF( ISBLANK( AnnualRevenue), 0,20)

fields.name: Data_Quality_Score__c

fields.calculatedFormula: IF(Leasing_Score__c <= 27, IMAGE("/img/samples/stars_100.gif", "1 Star"), IF(Leasing_Score__c <= 51, IMAGE("/img/samples/stars_200.gif", "2 Stars"), IF(Leasing_Score__c <= 68, IMAGE("/img/samples/stars_300.gif", "3 Stars"), IF(Leasing_Score__c <= 84, IMAGE("/img/samples/stars_400.gif", "4 Stars"), IMAGE("/img/samples/stars_500.gif", "5 Stars")))))
fields.inlineHelpText:
Star: Lead Quality Score Values
1 Star: 0 - 27
2 Stars: 28 - 51
3 Stars: 52 - 68
4 Stars: 69 - 84
5 Stars: 85 – 100
fields.label: Lead Quality Score Indicator
fields.name: Leasing_Score_Indicator__c

fields.calculatedFormula:
IF(

OR(

AND(

dhcsf__dhcsf_DHC_is_Active__c = TRUE,

OR(

DHC_Bed_Count_Score_V3__c = 0,

DHC_Num_of_Hospitals_Score_V3__c = 0,

DHC_BAD_IDN__c = TRUE

)

),

Secured_Party_Preferred_Score_V3__c = 0

),

0,

(

Secured_Party_Preferred_Score_V3__c +

Revenue_Score_V3__c+Filing_Ratio_Score_V3__c +

UCC_Filings_Score_V3__c +

Recency_of_Filings_Score_V3__c +

Multiple_SP_SingleAssetCat_V3__c +

Geography_FMV_Propensity_Score_V3__c +

DHC_Bed_Count_Score_V3__c +

DHC_Num_of_Hospitals_Score_V3__c

) / IF(dhcsf__dhcsf_DHC_is_Active__c = TRUE, 1.57, 1.17)

)

fields.inlineHelpText: Upon a successful match, D&B Connect populates this field that links the Account record to a specific D-U-N-S Number for display of a custom object with D&B data.
fields.label: D&B Connect Company Profile
fields.name: DNBConnect__D_B_Connect_Company_Profile__c

fields.inlineHelpText: A numeric value from 1 (low) up to 10 (high) indicating the level of certainty at which this possible candidate was included in this result set.
fields.label: D&B Match Confidence Code
fields.name: DNBConnect__D_B_Match_Confidence_Code__c

fields.inlineHelpText: The information that the matching process used to arrive at a match in addition to the application's business rules and parameters specified by the requestor. This is a 28-byte string consisting of 14 components of 2 bytes each. The 14 components are, in order, Name, Street Number, Street Name, Town Name, Territory Name, P.O. Box, Telephone, Post Code, D-U-N-S Number, Industry Code, Geographical Density, Location Uniqueness, Registration Number and URL.
fields.label: D&B Match Data Profile
fields.name: DNBConnect__D_B_Match_Data_Profile__c

fields.inlineHelpText: The compound rating that comprises one rating per type of data scored by a match engine. For example, in AABZBAAAFBZ the "A"; in the 1st position means that the Name scored between 80-100 and the "A"; in the 2nd position means that the Street Number had to score exactly 100. For more details, please see the Identity Resolution guide.
fields.label: D&B Match Grade
fields.name: DNBConnect__D_B_Match_Grade__c

fields.inlineHelpText:
The type of match performed to identify the identified entity. May be one of the following:
DUNS Number Lookup: D-U-N-S Number was used to perform match.
Name and Address Lookup: Name and Address were used to perform match.
National ID Lookup: Registration Number was used to perform match.
Telephone Number Lookup: Telephone Number was used to perform match.
ZIP Code Lookup: Postal Code was used to perform match.
Note: This parameter is not applicable for Multi-Process High-Volume Match.
fields.label: D&B Match Type
fields.name: DNBConnect__D_B_Match_Type__c

fields.inlineHelpText:
A number from -1 to 100 (including decimals) that indicates the detailed level of match on the name of the matched candidate.
0 indicates no match.
100 indicates most accurate match.
Note: This parameter is not applicable for Multi-Process High-Volume Match.
fields.label: D&B Name Match Score
fields.name: DNBConnect__D_B_Name_Match_Score__c

fields.inlineHelpText: This field indicates if the D-U-N-S value on this record has been Traded Up. The D-U-N-S Trade Up feature enables D&B Connect to enrich records with HQ location data directly into records matched at lower levels of the corporate family tree.
fields.label: D-U-N-S Traded Up
fields.name: DNBConnect__dunsTradedUp__c

fields.inlineHelpText: This field can be different from the D-U-N-S value held in the custom object. Refer to your D-U-N-S Trade Up settings within your project setup for more details on how this match was made.
fields.label: Matched D-U-N-S
fields.name: DNBConnect__matchedDuns__c

fields.inlineHelpText: Upon a successful match, D&B Connect populates this field and references it for future refreshes. The Dun & Bradstreet DUNS Number is a unique ID number given to a specific business entity in accordance with the Data Universal Numbering System (DUNS).
fields.label: D&B Connect DUNS Number
fields.name: D_B_Connect_DUNS_Number__c

fields.inlineHelpText: Total amount of won opportunities where opportunity record type is "MLC" or "MLC Partner"
fields.label: MLC Total Amount Won
fields.name: MLC_Total_Amount_Won__c

fields.inlineHelpText: Total amount of lost opportunities where opportunity record type is "MLC" or "MLC Partner"
fields.label: MLC Total Amount Lost
fields.name: MLC_Total_Amount_Lost__c

fields.calculatedFormula:
IF(
    RecordType.DeveloperName = "MITUS_Partner",

    "MITUSPartners/" &
    IF(
        BEGINS(Name, "zzz"),
        IF(BEGINS(MID(Name, 4, 1), "0"), "0-9",
        IF(BEGINS(MID(Name, 4, 1), "1"), "0-9",
        IF(BEGINS(MID(Name, 4, 1), "2"), "0-9",
        IF(BEGINS(MID(Name, 4, 1), "3"), "0-9",
        IF(BEGINS(MID(Name, 4, 1), "4"), "0-9",
        IF(BEGINS(MID(Name, 4, 1), "5"), "0-9",
        IF(BEGINS(MID(Name, 4, 1), "6"), "0-9",
        IF(BEGINS(MID(Name, 4, 1), "7"), "0-9",
        IF(BEGINS(MID(Name, 4, 1), "8"), "0-9",
        IF(BEGINS(MID(Name, 4, 1), "9"), "0-9",
        UPPER(MID(Name, 4, 1))
        )))))))))),
        IF(BEGINS(Name, "0"), "0-9",
        IF(BEGINS(Name, "1"), "0-9",
        IF(BEGINS(Name, "2"), "0-9",
        IF(BEGINS(Name, "3"), "0-9",
        IF(BEGINS(Name, "4"), "0-9",
        IF(BEGINS(Name, "5"), "0-9",
        IF(BEGINS(Name, "6"), "0-9",
        IF(BEGINS(Name, "7"), "0-9",
        IF(BEGINS(Name, "8"), "0-9",
        IF(BEGINS(Name, "9"), "0-9",
        UPPER(LEFT(Name, 1))
        ))))))))))
    ),

    "MITAccounts/" &
    IF(
        BEGINS(Name, "zzz"),
        IF(BEGINS(MID(Name, 4, 1), "0"), "0-9",
        IF(BEGINS(MID(Name, 4, 1), "1"), "0-9",
        IF(BEGINS(MID(Name, 4, 1), "2"), "0-9",
        IF(BEGINS(MID(Name, 4, 1), "3"), "0-9",
        IF(BEGINS(MID(Name, 4, 1), "4"), "0-9",
        IF(BEGINS(MID(Name, 4, 1), "5"), "0-9",
        IF(BEGINS(MID(Name, 4, 1), "6"), "0-9",
        IF(BEGINS(MID(Name, 4, 1), "7"), "0-9",
        IF(BEGINS(MID(Name, 4, 1), "8"), "0-9",
        IF(BEGINS(MID(Name, 4, 1), "9"), "0-9",
        UPPER(MID(Name, 4, 1))
        )))))))))),
        IF(BEGINS(Name, "0"), "0-9",
        IF(BEGINS(Name, "1"), "0-9",
        IF(BEGINS(Name, "2"), "0-9",
        IF(BEGINS(Name, "3"), "0-9",
        IF(BEGINS(Name, "4"), "0-9",
        IF(BEGINS(Name, "5"), "0-9",
        IF(BEGINS(Name, "6"), "0-9",
        IF(BEGINS(Name, "7"), "0-9",
        IF(BEGINS(Name, "8"), "0-9",
        IF(BEGINS(Name, "9"), "0-9",
        UPPER(LEFT(Name, 1))
        ))))))))))
    )
)
